title: Multi-filter search on same index doesn't work for SSR
body:
### 🐛 Current behavior Our site has product lister pages which are split up into sections. They search the same index, but show a subset of products with different filters. One section might show the title "Black T-Shirts" using filter `Color: Black` while the other might show "White T-Shirts" using filter `Color: White`. Our set-up with `react-instantseach` looks something like this: ```tsx

Black T-Shirts

White T-Shirts

 ``` And this works great. Except for when we introduce server-side rendering by using `getServerState()`. Example with Remix: ```tsx export function loader() { return getServerState(, { renderToString }); } export default function ProductLister() { const serverState = useLoaderData(); return ( {/* example from above */} ); } ``` When checking the server-side rendered HTML that gets produced, we noticed that both the "Black T-Shirts" section and the "White T-Shirts" section show the "White T-Shirts" results. ### 🔍 Steps to reproduce 1. Use `react-instantsearch` with two `` components targeting the same `indexName` but with different configuration. 2. Use `getServerState` w/ `` to enable server-side rendering. 3. View the server-rendered HTML. 4. Observe that the first index copies the result from the second index. ### Live reproduction https://codesandbox.io/p/github/LuudJanssen/algolia-multi-index-server-side-rendering-bug-reproduction/main?import=true > ⚠️ Be sure to view the HTML source of the sandbox preview. In the live preview, the client-side will refetch the query and update the results to what they should be. This only happens in the server-side rendered HTML result. ### 💭 Expected behavior Each instance of `` has its own configuration, set of filters and results, just like with client-side rendering. > While checking how `initialResults` is structured, I noticed the results are keyed by index name. This should probably be changed to a key that uses the index name, as well as any configuration like filters / facets / query, etc. ### Package version 7.13.9 ### Operating system _No response_ ### Browser _No response_ ### Code of Conduct - [X] I agree to follow this project's Code of Conduct
